name: Xalq Insurance Digital OS Social Studio Creative Audit Rubric

score_meaning.automated_gate_score: Objective production checks only. This is not final creative quality.
score_meaning.creative_judgment_score: Vision-capable LLM or senior human review of concept, craft, taste, and market strength.
score_meaning.final_score: Only available when automated gate and creative judgment are both present.

brand_fit: Uses brand red as accent or atmosphere, not as a heavy full-frame wash.
Feels premium, restrained, trust-led, and financial-services appropriate.
Avoids fake logos, fake readable text, random marks, and AI typography.
Keeps official logo, legal text, and contact lockup as deterministic layers.
art_direction: Has a clean upper-left copy zone for the headline.
Keeps key subjects away from footer and edge-safe zones.
Maintains clear visual hierarchy between subject, prop, message, and footer.
Looks like premium commercial photography rather than generic stock.
marketing_clarity: The travel-insurance need is legible within one second.
The campaign context is clear without overexplaining.
The headline and image reinforce the same idea.
The post informs calmly and does not create panic.
compliance_safety: Legal or regulatory claims have a source, review date, and owner.
Mandatory legal microcopy is not paraphrased.
No promise implies guaranteed coverage, border entry, visa status, or claim payout.
Dates are explicit and checked against the current campaign calendar.
production_readiness: Export dimensions and aspect ratios match target placements.
Footer zone is visually calm enough for logo, legal text, and contacts.
Headline zone is visually calm enough for readable Azerbaijani copy.
No crop variant damages the main subject or required safe areas.

critical_blockers: Wrong export dimensions for the placement.
AI-generated readable logo, legal text, phone number, or website inside the image.
Missing mandatory legal review for a regulatory claim.
Footer zone too busy for mandatory legal text.
A generated face, hand, passport, or document looks visibly broken.
creative_review_rules: Do not give a final approve decision from deterministic metrics alone.
Do not score 100 unless the work is both technically clean and creatively exceptional.
A visually acceptable post can still fail if the idea is generic, emotionally flat, off-brand, or weak as promotion.
A background-only audit cannot approve the final published asset; it can only approve the background gate.
Human or vision-LLM feedback should be recorded after each serious attempt so future prompt patches learn from real taste decisions.
